Class DownloadInfo

java.lang.Object
com.gomez.yourdownload.model.DownloadInfo
public class DownloadInfo extends Object
Model class representing a media resource within the application. Stores information about local files (path, download date) and network resources (network ID, sync status). * @author Rubén Gómez Hernández
Version:
1.0

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final String
    absolutePath
    * The local absolute path on the disk.
    private final Date
    downloadDate
    * The date when the file was downloaded.
    private final String
    fileName
    * The name of the media file.
    private boolean
    isInNetwork
    * Flag indicating if the file exists on the server.
    private boolean
    isNetworkOnly
    * Flag indicating if the resource has not been downloaded yet.
    private boolean
    isUploaded
    * Flag indicating if the local file has been successfully uploaded.
    private String
    mimeType
    * The media MIME type or file format extension.
    private Integer
    networkId
    * Unique identifier assigned by the server API.
    private final Long
    size
    * The size of the file in bytes.

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    DownloadInfo(Integer networkId, String fileName, Long size, String mimeType)
    Constructs a DownloadInfo instance for a network-only resource.
    DownloadInfo(String absolutePath, Date downloadDate, Long size, String mimeType)
    Constructs a DownloadInfo instance for a local file.

  • Field Details

    • fileName

      private final String fileName
      * The name of the media file.

    • absolutePath

      private final String absolutePath
      * The local absolute path on the disk. Null if resource is network-only.

    • downloadDate

      private final Date downloadDate
      * The date when the file was downloaded. Null if resource is network-only.

    • size

      private final Long size
      * The size of the file in bytes.

    • mimeType

      private String mimeType
      * The media MIME type or file format extension.

    • networkId

      private Integer networkId
      * Unique identifier assigned by the server API.

    • isInNetwork

      private boolean isInNetwork
      * Flag indicating if the file exists on the server.

    • isUploaded

      private boolean isUploaded
      * Flag indicating if the local file has been successfully uploaded.

    • isNetworkOnly

      private boolean isNetworkOnly
      * Flag indicating if the resource has not been downloaded yet.

  • Constructor Details

    • DownloadInfo

      public DownloadInfo(String absolutePath, Date downloadDate, Long size, String mimeType)
      Constructs a DownloadInfo instance for a local file.
      Parameters:
      absolutePath - The full system path to the file.
      downloadDate - The timestamp of the download.
      size - The file size in bytes.
      mimeType - The format or extension of the file.

    • DownloadInfo

      public DownloadInfo(Integer networkId, String fileName, Long size, String mimeType)
      Constructs a DownloadInfo instance for a network-only resource.
      Parameters:
      networkId - The unique ID provided by the API.
      fileName - The name of the remote file.
      size - The remote file size in bytes.
      mimeType - The format provided by the server.

  • Method Details

    • getFileName

      public String getFileName()
      Returns:
      The file name.

    • getAbsolutePath

      public String getAbsolutePath()
      Returns:
      The system absolute path.

    • getDownloadDate

      public Date getDownloadDate()
      Returns:
      The download date.

    • getSize

      public Long getSize()
      Returns:
      The size in bytes.

    • getMimeType

      public String getMimeType()
      Returns:
      The MIME type or extension.

    • setMimeType

      public void setMimeType(String mimeType)
      Parameters:
      mimeType - The new MIME type to set.

    • getNetworkId

      public Integer getNetworkId()
      Returns:
      The server-side network ID.

    • isNetworkOnly

      public boolean isNetworkOnly()
      Returns:
      True if the file only exists on the server.

    • isInNetwork

      public boolean isInNetwork()
      Returns:
      True if the file is available in the network.

    • isUploaded

      public boolean isUploaded()
      Returns:
      True if the file has been uploaded.

    • setNetworkId

      public void setNetworkId(Integer networkId)
      Parameters:
      networkId - Sets the network ID.

    • setIsInNetwork

      public void setIsInNetwork(boolean isInNetwork)
      Parameters:
      isInNetwork - Updates the network availability status.

    • setIsNetworkOnly

      public void setIsNetworkOnly(boolean isNetworkOnly)
      Parameters:
      isNetworkOnly - Updates the network-only status.

    • setIsUploaded

      public void setIsUploaded(boolean isUploaded)
      Parameters:
      isUploaded - Updates the upload status.

    • getFormatedSize

      public String getFormatedSize()
      Converts the raw byte size into a human-readable format (KB, MB, GB).
      Returns:
      A formatted string with the appropriate size unit.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Provides a summary of the media resource.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      String containing filename and formatted size.
